seoTitle: Connect Facebook Ads to HubSpot: Setup Guide
metaDescription: Link Facebook Ads to HubSpot to track ad spend, sync the Meta pixel, and measure ROI and contact-level attribution inside your CRM dashboard.
intro: Connecting Facebook Ads to HubSpot lets you track ad spend and ROI right alongside your CRM data, instead of jumping between Meta Business Manager and your reports. This guide covers verifying account access in Meta, authorizing the connection, and enabling auto-tracking so click parameters get applied to your ad links automatically. It ends with reviewing attribution metrics inside your dashboard.

steps.heading: Check Meta account access
steps.body: Confirm your administrative role and ad account access inside Meta Business Manager.

steps.heading: Open Ads settings in HubSpot
steps.body: Go to Settings, then Marketing, and select the Ads configuration tab.

steps.heading: Connect your account
steps.body: Click Connect Account and select Facebook from the available ad networks.

steps.heading: Complete the OAuth handshake
steps.body: Pass through the Meta OAuth screen, review permissions, and select your target ad accounts.

steps.heading: Enable auto-tracking
steps.body: Turn on the auto-tracking toggle so HubSpot click parameters apply to your Facebook ad links automatically.

steps.heading: Review your pixel and attribution data
steps.body: Check the Meta Pixel sync hub and open your Ads dashboard to confirm campaign spend and reach are flowing in.

faq.question: Does HubSpot sync the Meta pixel automatically?
faq.answer: Once connected, HubSpot can sync with your Meta Pixel setup and apply tracking parameters to your ad links.

faq.question: What permissions do I need in Meta Business Manager?
faq.answer: You need administrative roles and ad account access rights before connecting Facebook Ads to HubSpot.

faq.question: Can I see ROI from Facebook Ads inside HubSpot?
faq.answer: Yes, once connected, the Ads dashboard shows spend, reach, and contact-level attribution metrics.

faq.question: Does connecting Facebook Ads affect my existing campaigns?
faq.answer: No, the connection is for tracking and syncing data; it doesn't modify your live ad campaigns in Meta.
